app.name: Resolve
app.short_description: Cited research, voicemail, workflows, and confirmed updates.
app.long_description: Resolve helps agents retrieve cited customer, order, shipment, tracking, voicemail, historical-ticket, and workflow information, then apply approved Zendesk field and profile updates through dedicated confirmation.
app.installation_instructions: Provision the documented Cloudflare bindings, migrations, Queue, Vectorize metadata indexes, and Access policy; deploy the Resolve Worker; then enter its HTTPS URL, hostname, tenant settings, and secure integration credentials.

anthropic_model.label: Słones Claude model
anthropic_model.helpText: Enter a supported Claude model identifier, such as `claude-sonnet-5`.

anthropic_effort.label: Słones effort
anthropic_effort.helpText: Allowed values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh`, or `max`. Higher effort can increase latency and cost.

shipstation_mode.label: ShipStation API mode (v2, v1, or auto)

backend_auth_token.label: Resolve backend authentication token
backend_auth_token.helpText: Zendesk hides secure values after saving. Existing values are preserved during private-app updates; enter a value only when installing or rotating the token.

anthropic_api_key.label: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the key.

woo_solution_peptides_consumer_key.label: Solution Peptides WooCommerce consumer key
woo_solution_peptides_consumer_key.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the key.

woo_solution_peptides_consumer_secret.label: Solution Peptides WooCommerce consumer secret
woo_solution_peptides_consumer_secret.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the secret.

woo_atomik_labz_consumer_key.label: Atomik Labz WooCommerce consumer key
woo_atomik_labz_consumer_key.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the key.

woo_atomik_labz_consumer_secret.label: Atomik Labz WooCommerce consumer secret
woo_atomik_labz_consumer_secret.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the secret.

shipstation_v2_key.label: ShipStation v2 API key
shipstation_v2_key.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the key.

shipstation_v1_key.label: ShipStation v1 API key
shipstation_v1_key.helpText: Stored securely by Zendesk and hidden after saving. Leave blank during updates unless rotating the key.

shipstation_v1_secret.label: ShipStation v1 API secret
